goal: Fail closed when /gemini review does not produce a Gemini review for the latest PR head commit.
assumptions: Gemini responses can be delayed or absent.
GitHub Actions can inspect PR reviews and issue comments with gh api.
risks: Timeout duration can be too short for slow Gemini responses.
Polling holds a runner while waiting.
acceptance: No Gemini review after timeout adds gemini-review-needs-human and fails.
A Gemini review on the latest commit passes.
Regression tests cover found and timeout planning.
